promotion_tool: governed dev→release promotion (copy allow-listed changed files + ZIP)
store_upload: NONE — no Chrome Web Store upload performed by this promotion
github_release: NONE — no GitHub Release created by this promotion
wildcard_host_permissions: NONE — AG-363 removed https://*/* from manifest.chrome.json and manifest.firefox.json (unchanged by this promotion)
note: Governed dev→release promotion of AG-PROMPT-376 (financial-document false-positive fix). Exactly one allow-listed file changed since the AG-375 promotion lineage (source commit f4a421c): src/detection/packs/nordic.ts (confirmed via git diff against f4a421c, restricted to the full AG-269 allow-list, and independently via a full recursive src/ tree diff between dev and release before this promotion — no other allow-listed file touched). AG-376 root cause: nordic-financial-terms included the bare English word 'balance' in its Nordic-language regex alongside genuine Danish financial terms (regnskab/aarsrapport/resultatopgorelse/omsaetning/driftsresultat), with no requirement for corroborating financial or Nordic-language context. 'Balance' has an extremely common non-financial meaning (visual/design balance, e.g. 'the right balance') that caused a website/layout review document with no financial content to fire a financial signal. The operator's own working hypothesis (repeated 'margins', px measurements, premium/risk/metrics terms) was tested directly against the actual reproduction text and disproved by surgical in-memory word removal; only removing 'balance' eliminated the false positive. Classification: FINANCIAL_ANCHOR_TOO_WEAK. Fix: removed bare 'balance' from the pattern's alternation. Genuine 'balance sheet' mentions remain covered by english.ts's phrase-level english-financial-statement pattern (/\b(balance\s+sheet|income\s+statement|...)\b/i), unaffected and untouched. Real Nordic financial documents remain detected, verified against the pre-existing nordic-financial-report-paste gold fixture (still fires via the remaining genuinely Nordic-specific terms) and the clean-nordic-prose negative fixture (unaffected). This is a detection-pattern precision fix only — no detection threshold structure, RiskSignal structure, deduplication, or chunking logic changed; signal ID nordic-financial-terms remains fully registered, only its match pattern narrowed. AG-369/370/371/374 (previously promoted) remain included unchanged: handleDrop's event.stopImmediatePropagation() Copilot drag/drop Cancel fix, the shared toRealmSafeBytes() same-realm deep-copy helper for DOCX/XLSX/PPTX Firefox Xray-wrapper extraction parity, and the XLSX/PPTX extraction success-semantics fix. No manifest, permission, or host-scope change (permissions: ['storage'] only; host_permissions limited to the 6 listed patterns; no activeTab; no wildcard/https://*/*; no <all_urls>; connect-src 'none'). No telemetry, network diagnostics, or centralized logging added; no raw document content, file names, or personal data logged or persisted (production bundle strips all console.log/console.debug via terser pure_funcs, verified; zero new diagnostic calls in nordic.ts). The local, real-world reproduction files used to diagnose this issue (docs/test-files/1.txt, 2.txt, 3.txt) were never committed, never quoted in any report, and are not part of this or any prior promotion. Dev-side verification (this promotion): tsc 0 errors; CORE 53/53 (incl. new test-financial-margin-layout-false-positive.ts 15/15); e2e 6/6 (drag-drop incl. both AG-369 Copilot-pattern Cancel/Continue tests, docx-upload); corpus gold harness 30/0/1-blocked (pre-existing, unrelated); clipboard gold harness 125/125 (incl. both pre-existing nordic fixtures re-verified unaffected); signal-manifest-integrity 24/24 (no registration drift); verify-manifest 28/28; Chrome build 34/34 + 20/20 consumer-copy; Firefox build 25/25. Firefox live-runtime e2e (interception-smoke.firefox.spec.ts) remains environment-blocked — 3 skipped, re-verified unchanged in this run (pre-existing AG-213 geckodriver 0.37.0 / Firefox 151.0.2 extension-injection incompatibility, not a new failure and not caused by this fix). Release gate results and final ZIP artifact hygiene recorded after build (see report). No store upload; no GitHub Release; no website repo modified.
